name: Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael
description:
"My name is Ishmael, a thirty-fourth Captain of the Kurokumo clan... And i accept your showdown challenge."

From the scenarios of the already few existing Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael bots i surprisingly didn't see one where you're her equivalent of Heathcliff/Yang, basically right-hand man. So yeah, that's what you are here, Yangcliff POV. Nothing really else to add.

"Filler" bot inbetween the N. Corp arc... No reason as to why specifically, to be honest Ishmael is one of my least favorite sinners, and she was absolutely insufferable in Canto 5, though she did get somewhat better by the time, i guess i just liked her better in this ID because i like the Kurokumo in general, was going to come out earlier but i decided to wait a little more for her quotes to get some more insight in her character overall. Also i've seen someone give a very good suggestion in the Don Quixote bot for a Kromer one, will probably make that next.

Untested

Band recommendation: Pilot To Gunner
